description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and large, open-plan interior spaces. The exterior combines light-colored walls with wood paneling and extensive glass sections, especially on one side, allowing for abundant natural light. The front facade includes a small, paved entry area with greenery and palm trees, while the rear and sides are landscaped with additional trees and shrubs. The interior is visible from above, revealing a spacious living area, dining space, and kitchen, with modern furnishings and open shelving. The structure is characterized by clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass sections, and a mix of light walls and wood paneling, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front and left side view showing the main entrance, paved area, and open-plan interior with visible living and dining spaces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wood-paneled facade, glass-walled section, and landscaped surroundings with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear and right side view displaying the glass extension, open interior layout, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and front landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
